- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  Default target language is English, and the CLI contract is `dubb <input_path> [output_path]`.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  Created an installable Python package with src layout, tests, and a console script.

- [x] Customize the Project
  Implemented the dubbing pipeline with transcription, translation, voice cloning, time fitting, muxing, and stage logging.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  No extensions were required.

- [x] Compile the Project
  Verified with an editable install and a passing pytest run.

- [x] Create and Run Task
  Attempted with the VS Code task helper, which returned `Task not found`; no task file was generated.

- [x] Launch the Project
  No debug launch was created because this is a CLI project and no launch request was made.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  README, Colab notebook, and workspace instructions were updated to match the current project state.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
